success-achievement.title: Dua of Musa for Confidence and Clarity
success-achievement.arabic: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي ۝ وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي ۝ وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِنْ لِسَانِي ۝ يَفْقَهُوا قَوْلِي
success-achievement.latin: Rabbi ishrah li sadri, wa yassir li amri, wahlul uqdatan min lisani, yafqahu qawli.
success-achievement.translation: My Lord, expand for me my chest, ease my task for me, untie the knot from my tongue, so they may understand my speech.
success-achievement.benefits: A powerful supplication for composure, clarity, public speaking, and any difficult responsibility.

success-achievement.title: Dua for Increase in Knowledge
success-achievement.translation: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.
success-achievement.benefits: Recite for study, beneficial learning, stronger understanding, and growth in useful knowledge.

success-achievement.title: Dua for Accepted Efforts
success-achievement.arabic: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
success-achievement.latin: Rabbana taqabbal minna innaka anta as-Sami ul-Alim.
success-achievement.translation: Our Lord, accept from us. Indeed, You are the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
success-achievement.benefits: A beautiful dua when finishing good deeds, projects, worship, or work you hope Allah will accept.

success-achievement.title: Dua for Honorable Openings
success-achievement.arabic: رَبِّ أَدْخِلْنِي مُدْخَلَ صِدْقٍ وَأَخْرِجْنِي مُخْرَجَ صِدْقٍ وَاجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ سُلْطَانًا نَصِيرًا
success-achievement.latin: Rabbi adkhilni mudkhala sidqin wa akhrijni mukhraja sidqin wajal li min ladunka sultanan nasira.
success-achievement.translation: My Lord, cause me to enter a sound entrance and to exit a sound exit, and grant me from Yourself a supporting authority.
success-achievement.benefits: A meaningful supplication before beginning new responsibilities, transitions, projects, or public roles.

success-achievement.title: Dua for Wisdom and Righteous Outcome
success-achievement.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ
success-achievement.latin: Rabbi hab li hukman wa alhiqni bis-salihin.
success-achievement.translation: My Lord, grant me wisdom and join me with the righteous.
success-achievement.benefits: Ask Allah to pair outward success with wisdom, sincerity, and righteous company.

rizq-barakah.title: Dua for Pure Provision
rizq-barakah.translation: O Allah, I ask You for pure and wholesome provision.
rizq-barakah.benefits: Ask Allah for halal income, good provision, and sustenance with peace and blessing in it.

rizq-barakah.title: Dua for Relief from Debt and Haram
rizq-barakah.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
rizq-barakah.latin: Allahummakfini bihalalika an haramika wa aghnini bifadlika amman siwaka.
rizq-barakah.translation: O Allah, suffice me with what You made lawful instead of what You made unlawful, and enrich me by Your bounty from dependence on anyone besides You.
rizq-barakah.benefits: A well-loved dua for debt, financial strain, and asking Allah for lawful sufficiency and independence.

rizq-barakah.title: Dua for Blessing in Provision
rizq-barakah.translation: O Allah, bless for us what You have provided us.
rizq-barakah.benefits: Seek lasting barakah in what you already have, not just increase in amount.

rizq-barakah.title: Dua of Musa in Need
rizq-barakah.arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّي لِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ
rizq-barakah.latin: Rabbi inni lima anzalta ilayya min khayrin faqir.
rizq-barakah.translation: My Lord, truly I am in need of whatever good You send down to me.
rizq-barakah.benefits: A humble dua for provision, openings, and relief when you feel materially or emotionally stretched.

rizq-barakah.title: Dua for Allah's Bounty
rizq-barakah.translation: O Allah, I ask You from Your bounty.
rizq-barakah.benefits: A concise supplication for rizq, opportunity, and doors of provision that come from Allah alone.

guidance-clarity.title: Dua for Guidance and Correctness
guidance-clarity.translation: O Allah, guide me and grant me correctness.
guidance-clarity.benefits: A concise supplication for right choices, steadiness, and truthfulness in action.

guidance-clarity.title: Dua for Steadfast Hearts
guidance-clarity.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا وَهَبْ لَنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً ۚ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ
guidance-clarity.latin: Rabbana la tuzigh qulubana bada idh hadaytana wa hab lana min ladunka rahmah, innaka anta al-Wahhab.
guidance-clarity.translation: Our Lord, do not let our hearts deviate after You have guided us, and grant us mercy from Yourself. Surely You are the Bestower.
guidance-clarity.benefits: Ask Allah for a firm heart, sincerity, and protection from confusion after guidance.

guidance-clarity.title: Dua for the Straight Path
guidance-clarity.translation: Guide us to the Straight Path.
guidance-clarity.benefits: The central dua of every day for clear direction, righteousness, and staying on the truth.

guidance-clarity.title: Dua for a Firm Heart
guidance-clarity.arabic: يَا مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوبِ ثَبِّتْ قَلْبِي عَلَى دِينِكَ
guidance-clarity.latin: Ya Muqallibal-qulub thabbit qalbi ala dinik.
guidance-clarity.translation: O Turner of the hearts, make my heart firm upon Your religion.
guidance-clarity.benefits: A prophetic dua for stability, conviction, and protection from wavering faith.

guidance-clarity.title: Dua for Right Judgment
guidance-clarity.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ
guidance-clarity.latin: Rabbi hab li hukman wa alhiqni bis-salihin.
guidance-clarity.translation: My Lord, grant me wisdom and join me with the righteous.
guidance-clarity.benefits: A dua for sound judgment, wise choices, and a life shaped by righteous company.

protection-trials.title: Dua for Daily Protection
protection-trials.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
protection-trials.latin: Bismillahil-ladhi la yadurru ma asmihi shayun fil-ardi wa la fis-sama, wa huwa as-Sami ul-Alim.
protection-trials.translation: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing on earth or in the heaven can cause harm, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
protection-trials.benefits: A foundational supplication for seeking Allah's protection from harm, calamity, and unseen danger.

protection-trials.title: Dua for Refuge from All Created Harm
protection-trials.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
protection-trials.latin: Audhu bikalimatillahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq.
protection-trials.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He created.
protection-trials.benefits: Recited for shelter from harm, fear, danger, and many forms of worldly evil.

protection-trials.title: Dua of Reliance During Fear
protection-trials.translation: Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best disposer of affairs.
protection-trials.benefits: A statement of trust when fear rises, pressure builds, or your heart needs to return to tawakkul.

protection-trials.title: Dua for Safety and Security
protection-trials.translation: O Allah, conceal my vulnerabilities and calm my fears.
protection-trials.benefits: A beautiful dua for personal safety, emotional reassurance, and protection from exposure or panic.

protection-trials.title: Dua for Protection from Severe Illness
protection-trials.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْبَرَصِ وَالْجُنُونِ وَالْجُذَامِ وَمِنْ سَيِّئِ الْأَسْقَامِ
protection-trials.latin: Allahumma inni audhu bika minal-barasi wal-jununi wal-judhami wa min sayyi il-asqam.
protection-trials.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from leprosy, madness, elephantiasis, and evil diseases.
protection-trials.benefits: Ask Allah for protection from trials that affect the body, mind, and dignity.

calm-healing.title: Dua for Worry and Sadness
calm-healing.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ
calm-healing.latin: Allahumma inni audhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan.
calm-healing.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from worry and sadness.
calm-healing.benefits: A simple but powerful prophetic dua for emotional heaviness, stress, and sadness.

calm-healing.title: Dua for Mercy and Rescue
calm-healing.arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ
calm-healing.latin: Ya Hayyu ya Qayyum birahmatika astaghith.
calm-healing.translation: O Ever-Living, O Sustainer, by Your mercy I seek relief.
calm-healing.benefits: Turn to this dua when you feel overwhelmed and need Allah's mercy, help, and steadiness.

calm-healing.title: Dua for Healing
calm-healing.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ رَبَّ النَّاسِ اشْفِ أَنْتَ الشَّافِي لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
calm-healing.latin: Allahumma adhhibil-basa Rabb an-nas, ishfi anta ash-Shafi, la shifaa illa shifauk, shifaan la yughadiru saqama.
calm-healing.translation: O Allah, remove the illness, Lord of mankind, and heal, for You are the Healer. There is no healing except Your healing, a healing that leaves behind no sickness.
calm-healing.benefits: A beautiful dua for physical healing, emotional recovery, and asking Allah for complete shifa.

calm-healing.title: Dua for Relief from Grief
calm-healing.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَبْدُكَ ابْنُ عَبْدِكَ ابْنُ أَمَتِكَ نَاصِيَتِي بِيَدِكَ مَاضٍ فِيَّ حُكْمُكَ عَدْلٌ فِيَّ قَضَاؤُكَ
calm-healing.latin: Allahumma inni abduka ibnu abdika ibnu amatika, nasiyati biyadika, madin fiyya hukmuka, adlun fiyya qadauka.
calm-healing.translation: O Allah, I am Your servant, the son of Your servant, the son of Your maidservant. My forelock is in Your hand, Your command over me is forever executed, and Your decree over me is just.
calm-healing.benefits: The opening of a famous prophetic supplication for grief, anxiety, and returning the heart to Allah's wisdom.

calm-healing.title: Dua to Ask Allah for Healing
calm-healing.arabic: أَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْعَظِيمَ رَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ أَنْ يَشْفِيَكَ
calm-healing.translation: I ask Allah the Magnificent, Lord of the Magnificent Throne, to heal you.
calm-healing.benefits: A direct supplication for visiting the sick or praying over yourself with hope in Allah's healing.

ease-relief.title: Dua for Ease in Difficulty
ease-relief.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلًا
ease-relief.latin: Allahumma la sahla illa ma jaaltahu sahla, wa anta tajalul-hazna idha shita sahla.
ease-relief.translation: O Allah, there is no ease except in what You make easy, and You can make difficulty easy if You will.
ease-relief.benefits: A beloved dua for exams, work, emotional strain, and any moment that feels too heavy.

ease-relief.title: Dua of Ayyub During Hardship
ease-relief.arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُّرُّ وَأَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
ease-relief.latin: Rabbi inni massaniyad-durru wa anta arhamur-rahimin.
ease-relief.translation: My Lord, harm has touched me, and You are the Most Merciful of the merciful.
ease-relief.benefits: A Quranic dua for hardship, illness, emotional pain, and asking Allah for merciful relief.

ease-relief.title: Promise of Ease After Hardship
ease-relief.arabic: فَإِنَّ مَعَ الْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا ۝ إِنَّ مَعَ الْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
ease-relief.latin: Fa inna maal-usri yusra, inna maal-usri yusra.
ease-relief.translation: Indeed, with hardship comes ease. Indeed, with hardship comes ease.
ease-relief.benefits: A reminder to hold onto hope and trust that Allah does not leave hardship without relief.

ease-relief.title: Treasure of Relief and Reliance
ease-relief.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
ease-relief.latin: La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.
ease-relief.translation: There is no power and no strength except through Allah.
ease-relief.benefits: A powerful dhikr for surrender, resilience, and finding relief by leaning on Allah's strength rather than your own.

ease-relief.title: Dua for Rescue from Oppression
ease-relief.translation: My Lord, save me from the wrongdoing people.
ease-relief.benefits: Turn to this dua when asking Allah to open a way out from pressure, injustice, or oppressive circumstances.

family-relationships.title: Dua for Spouses and Children
family-relationships.arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
family-relationships.latin: Rabbana hab lana min azwajina wa dhurriyyatina qurrata ayunin wajalna lil-muttaqina imama.
family-relationships.translation: Our Lord, grant us from among our spouses and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us leaders for the righteous.
family-relationships.benefits: A profound dua for family peace, righteous homes, and long-term spiritual legacy.

family-relationships.title: Dua for Parents and Believers
family-relationships.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَوْمَ يَقُومُ الْحِسَابُ
family-relationships.latin: Rabbana ghfir li wa liwalidayya wa lil-muminina yawma yaqumul-hisab.
family-relationships.translation: Our Lord, forgive me, my parents, and the believers on the Day the account is established.
family-relationships.benefits: A Quranic dua that joins personal repentance with mercy for parents and the wider believing community.

family-relationships.title: Dua for Love and Unity
family-relationships.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَلِّفْ بَيْنَ قُلُوبِنَا وَأَصْلِحْ ذَاتَ بَيْنِنَا
family-relationships.latin: Allahumma allif bayna qulubina wa aslih dhata baynina.
family-relationships.translation: O Allah, unite our hearts and set right what is between us.
family-relationships.benefits: Ask Allah for reconciliation, softer hearts, and repair in family or community relationships.
family-relationships.source: Reported in prophetic supplications with authentic meaning

family-relationships.title: Dua of Mercy for Parents
family-relationships.translation: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they brought me up when I was small.
family-relationships.benefits: One of the most beautiful Quranic duas for honoring parents with mercy, gratitude, and prayer.

family-relationships.title: Dua for Righteous Children
family-relationships.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ ذُرِّيَّةً طَيِّبَةً إِنَّكَ سَمِيعُ الدُّعَاءِ
family-relationships.latin: Rabbi hab li min ladunka dhurriyyatan tayyibah, innaka samiud-dua.
family-relationships.translation: My Lord, grant me from Yourself righteous offspring. Indeed, You are the Hearer of supplication.
family-relationships.benefits: A heartfelt dua for children, family growth, and barakah in future generations.

forgiveness-hereafter.title: Dua of Yunus for Forgiveness and Relief
forgiveness-hereafter.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
forgiveness-hereafter.latin: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu minaz-zalimin.
forgiveness-hereafter.translation: There is no god but You; glory be to You. Indeed, I have been among the wrongdoers.
forgiveness-hereafter.benefits: A mighty dua of repentance, humility, and relief in distress.

forgiveness-hereafter.title: Dua for Paradise
forgiveness-hereafter.translation: O Allah, I ask You for Paradise.
forgiveness-hereafter.benefits: A simple and sincere dua centering the heart on the ultimate success of the Hereafter.

forgiveness-hereafter.title: Dua for Protection from the Fire
forgiveness-hereafter.translation: O Allah, protect me from the Fire.
forgiveness-hereafter.benefits: A short dua to regularly ask Allah for safety from Hellfire and a good ending.

forgiveness-hereafter.title: Dua for Allah's Pardon
forgiveness-hereafter.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
forgiveness-hereafter.latin: Allahumma innaka afuwwun tuhibbul-afwa fafu anni.
forgiveness-hereafter.translation: O Allah, You are Pardoning and You love to pardon, so pardon me.
forgiveness-hereafter.benefits: A beloved prophetic dua for Laylat al-Qadr and any time you long for Allah's forgiveness and erasing of sins.

forgiveness-hereafter.title: Dua for Mercy and Forgiveness
forgiveness-hereafter.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ وَارْحَمْ وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
forgiveness-hereafter.translation: My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful.
forgiveness-hereafter.benefits: A concise Quranic supplication for repentance, mercy, and hope in Allah's gentleness.

wellbeing-gratitude.title: Dua for Well-Being
wellbeing-gratitude.translation: O Allah, I ask You for well-being.
wellbeing-gratitude.benefits: A broad dua for protection, health, peace, and wholesome safety in all parts of life.

wellbeing-gratitude.title: Dua for Gratitude
wellbeing-gratitude.arabic: رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَالِدَيَّ
wellbeing-gratitude.latin: Rabbi awzini an ashkura nimataka allati anamta alayya wa ala walidayya.
wellbeing-gratitude.translation: My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents.
wellbeing-gratitude.benefits: A dua to anchor the heart in gratitude, humility, and recognition of Allah's favors.

wellbeing-gratitude.title: Dua for Guidance, Piety, and Contentment
wellbeing-gratitude.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالتُّقَى وَالْعَفَافَ وَالْغِنَى
wellbeing-gratitude.latin: Allahumma inni asalukal-huda wat-tuqa wal-afafa wal-ghina.
wellbeing-gratitude.translation: O Allah, I ask You for guidance, piety, chastity, and contentment.
wellbeing-gratitude.benefits: A holistic prophetic dua for spiritual health, self-restraint, and inner richness.

wellbeing-gratitude.title: Dua for Gratitude in Worship
wellbeing-gratitude.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
wellbeing-gratitude.latin: Allahumma ainni ala dhikrika wa shukrika wa husni ibadatik.
wellbeing-gratitude.translation: O Allah, help me remember You, thank You, and worship You beautifully.
wellbeing-gratitude.benefits: Ask Allah to make gratitude practical by helping you remember Him and worship Him well.

wellbeing-gratitude.title: Dua for Pardon and Lasting Safety
wellbeing-gratitude.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
wellbeing-gratitude.latin: Allahumma inni asalukal-afwa wal-afiyah fid-dunya wal-akhirah.
wellbeing-gratitude.translation: O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in this world and the Hereafter.
wellbeing-gratitude.benefits: A comprehensive dua for safety, forgiveness, and stable well-being in both dunya and akhirah.

general-blessings.title: Dua for Good in This Life and the Next
general-blessings.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
general-blessings.latin: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanah wa fil-akhirati hasanah wa qina adhab an-nar.
general-blessings.translation: Our Lord, grant us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
general-blessings.benefits: One of the most comprehensive duas in the Qur'an for balanced goodness in dunya and akhirah.

general-blessings.title: Dua for Mercy and Sound Judgment
general-blessings.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً وَهَيِّئْ لَنَا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا رَشَدًا
general-blessings.latin: Rabbana atina min ladunka rahmah wa hayyi lana min amrina rashada.
general-blessings.translation: Our Lord, grant us mercy from Yourself and prepare for us right guidance in our affair.
general-blessings.benefits: A broad dua for mercy, wise outcomes, and being led toward what is right.

general-blessings.title: Dua for Wisdom and Righteous Company
general-blessings.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ
general-blessings.latin: Rabbi hab li hukman wa alhiqni bis-salihin.
general-blessings.translation: My Lord, grant me wisdom and join me with the righteous.
general-blessings.benefits: A concise prayer to ask Allah for wise judgment and companions who help you grow in goodness.

general-blessings.title: Dua for Mercy When We Forget
general-blessings.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَا إِنْ نَسِينَا أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا
general-blessings.latin: Rabbana la tuakhidhna in nasina aw akhtana.
general-blessings.translation: Our Lord, do not hold us accountable if we forget or make a mistake.
general-blessings.benefits: A gentle dua that reminds the heart of Allah's mercy when we fall short, forget, or err.
